review_comment: We may want to try updating the nullability annotations on the `_request` field as well here.
Yes, that should probably be done too. It would be cleaner. But then there are a few more null checks missing in this type, I guess...

Yep -- it expands the scope of the PR a bit, but I figure this is the right time to do it while we have a motivating scenario.

If you don't have capacity to make the change, I'm happy to take a stab at it.
I can give it a go. Happy to contribute.

Personally, I think it would be clearer to check whether `contentType` is null (rather than testing `_request`) - the fact that a null `_request` yields a null `ContentType` seems like an implementation detail.
